description: Synthetic PP&D document metadata compliance findings used to verify deterministic action guardrails without live crawl or authenticated DevHub automation.

action_impacts.reason: Plan PDF metadata does not meet the synthetic PP&D file naming rule, so upload staging must wait.
A permit request cannot be submitted while required upload metadata is noncompliant.

safe_actions.label: Rename plan PDF
safe_actions.rationale: Bring the local filename metadata into compliance before any official upload action.

action_impacts.reason: Synthetic metadata marks the calculations PDF as not searchable.
Correction upload is consequential and must wait for searchable PDF metadata.

safe_actions.label: Rebuild searchable PDF
safe_actions.rationale: Regenerate or OCR the local PDF and rerun metadata validation.

action_impacts.reason: Submission must wait until stale authorization metadata is resolved.

safe_actions.label: Request current authorization
safe_actions.rationale: Ask the user for current authorization before certification or submission.

action_impacts.reason: Compliant informational finding should not block action.

safe_actions.label: Review cover sheet note
safe_actions.rationale: The user can review the optional note without making an official change.
